description_long: This helmet consists of three distinct, rounded black headpieces arranged side by side, each featuring a prominent white geometric symbol on the front: a circle, a square, and a triangle. The surface appears to be a matte, mesh-like material, likely designed for breathability and visibility, with a subtle grid pattern visible on the face area. The helmets are smooth and seamless, with no visible external attachments, vents, or visors. The geometric symbols are highly visible and occupy most of the front face of each helmet, suggesting a design intended for easy identification. The overall form is compact and closely follows the contours of a human head, with a slight bulge at the front for facial coverage. The back and sides are plain, with the mesh texture continuing uniformly around the helmet.
description: A set of three black helmets with mesh-like surfaces, each featuring a bold white geometric symbol (circle, square, triangle) on the front. The design is sleek, minimal, and highly recognizable.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rounded profile and the depth of the helmet, with no visible symbols or features except the smooth, curved surface.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the three helmets side by side, each with a distinct white geometric symbol (circle, square, triangle) on a black mesh background.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, again showing the smooth, curved profile without visible symbols.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the helmets, which are plain and feature the same mesh texture as the rest of the surface, with no symbols or additional features.
attribute_graphic_design: Each helmet features a large, bold white geometric symbol (circle, square, triangle) on the front, set against a black mesh background. The design is minimalistic and highly graphic.
